summary: Completed testing of Professional Registration module (Matchmaker). Fixed critical route ordering bug where GET /api/matchmaker/professionals/draft was being matched by /{professional_id} route. All 17 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI testing confirmed all 5 registration steps work correctly including Save Draft functionality.
passed_tests: 1. GET /api/auth/me - Authentication working - PASS
2. GET /api/matchmaker/categories - Returns 15 professional categories - PASS
3. GET /api/matchmaker/cities - Returns 24 Indian cities - PASS
4. GET /api/matchmaker/expertise-tags - Returns expertise tags - PASS
5. POST /api/matchmaker/professionals/draft - Save draft - PASS
6. POST /api/matchmaker/professionals/draft - Update existing draft - PASS
7. GET /api/matchmaker/professionals/draft - Get user's draft (FIXED) - PASS
8. POST /api/matchmaker/professionals - Create IPO Consultant profile - PASS
9. POST /api/matchmaker/professionals - Create Merchant Banker profile - PASS
10. POST /api/matchmaker/professionals - Create Chartered Accountant profile - PASS
11. POST /api/matchmaker/professionals - Create Company Secretary profile - PASS
12. POST /api/matchmaker/professionals - Create Legal/Tax profile - PASS
13. GET /api/matchmaker/professionals/all - Get all professionals - PASS
14. GET /api/matchmaker/professionals/all?category=chartered_accountants - Category filter - PASS
15. GET /api/matchmaker/professionals/all?city=Mumbai - City filter - PASS
16. POST /api/matchmaker/professionals - Validation rejects missing required fields - PASS
17. GET /api/matchmaker/professionals/draft - Returns 404 for new user without draft - PASS
18. UI Step 1 (Basic Info) - Category selection, name, email, mobile fields - PASS
19. UI Step 2 (Registration Numbers) - Category-specific fields (GSTIN for IPO, ICAI for CA) - PASS
20. UI Step 3 (Expertise) - Location selection, experience, expertise tags - PASS
21. UI Step 4 (Documents) - Document upload fields displayed - PASS
22. UI Save Draft button - Saves draft successfully with toast notification - PASS
23. UI Form validation - Shows error toasts for missing required fields - PASS
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed route ordering: moved /matchmaker/professionals/draft routes BEFORE /{professional_id} route to prevent route conflict. Renamed model to ProfessionalDraftModel and functions to avoid duplicates.
test_credentials: Session created via mongosh for test-user-* and test-ui-user-* (cleaned up after testing)
seed_data_creation: Test profiles created during testing are cleaned up automatically by pytest fixtures
context_for_next_testing_agent: Professional Registration module is fully functional. Key test IDs: category-select, name-input, email-input, mobile-input, agency-input, experience-input, next-step-btn, submit-registration-btn, terms-checkbox. Registration fields vary by category (GSTIN for IPO Consultants, ICAI for CAs, SEBI for Merchant Bankers, etc.). Draft save/load working correctly after route fix.

bugs_fixed.root_cause: Route ordering bug - /{professional_id} route (line 1908) was defined before /draft routes (lines 2033-2096), causing FastAPI to match 'draft' as a professional_id parameter
bugs_fixed.fix: Moved /draft routes (POST, GET, GET/{draft_id}, DELETE/{draft_id}) to be defined BEFORE /{professional_id} route. Renamed model class to ProfessionalDraftModel and function names to avoid duplicates.
bugs_fixed.verification: API now returns correct draft data. Tested via curl and UI - draft saves and loads correctly.

step_1_basic_info.description: Category selection, name, agency, email, mobile fields

step_3_expertise.description: Service locations, years of experience, expertise tags selection

step_4_documents.description: PAN, Aadhaar, Registration certificate uploads with expiry date

save_draft_button.description: Saves draft at any step with success toast

form_validation.description: Shows error toasts for missing required fields

draft_api_failure.investigation: Checked route definitions in server.py using grep. Found /{professional_id} route at line 1908 and /draft routes at lines 2033-2096
draft_api_failure.root_cause: FastAPI matches routes in order of definition. The /{professional_id} route was defined before /draft routes, so 'draft' was being matched as a professional_id parameter and looking for a professional with ID 'draft'
draft_api_failure.fix: Moved all /draft route definitions (POST, GET, GET/{draft_id}, DELETE/{draft_id}) to be defined BEFORE the /{professional_id} route. Also renamed model class to ProfessionalDraftModel and function names to avoid duplicate definitions.
draft_api_failure.verification: API now returns correct draft data. Tested via curl and UI - draft saves and loads correctly.
